{{CargoRelic
|name=The Jewish Bride
|class_id=21141
|rank=SSS
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=Rembrandt’s golden embrace - a marital vow painted in divine light. Art history’s most enigmatic love portrait.
|fame=48
|art=108
|fth=71
|civ=71
|tech=64
|ss1=Demon Minion HP +3%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 240<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +6<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30
|ss2=Demon Minion HP +4%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 320<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +8<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30
|ss3=Demon Minion HP +5%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 400<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +10<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30
|ss4=Demon Minion HP +7%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 560<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +14<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30
|ss5=Demon Minion HP +9%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 720<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +18<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30
|ss6=Demon Minion HP +12%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 960<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +24<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30
|ss7=Demon Minion HP +12%<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 960<br>Per Spatial Realm participation, Snail DEF +24<br>Spatial Realm Participation: 30/30<br>Protomon Snail assist DMG + 800 (Awakened)
|skill1=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: This Relic's ART +15
|skill2=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, 2x Card Drops +6%
|skill3=[[File:Rift skill III.png|50px]]Place in Rift Museum: In the Rift, Angel Cells gained +15%
}}
